summary: Phase 5.5 Super-Admin: tested backend (22/22 pytest pass) and frontend (Playwright e2e all flows pass). Backend covers all admin endpoints (dashboard/stats, attention-items, organizers-rich w/ filters+sort+activity, audit-log w/ pagination+filter, /admin/events enriched, 5 CSV exports incl. monthly report with TOTAL row), RBAC (organizer → 403, unauth → 401/403), and perf (<500ms). Frontend covers admin login redirect, sidebar 7-item nav, header user-menu+badge, dashboard KPIs/charts/activity/top tables/attention banner, /admin/eventos table+filters+search+CSV download, /admin/auditoria table+filters+detail dialog, /admin/reportes 5 cards + monthly selector, and organizer RBAC ('Acceso denegado' screen).
critical_code_review_comments: AdminEvents.jsx & AdminAuditLog.jsx render the [data-testid=admin-events-table]/[audit-table] only after data loads (conditional on loading state). Consider rendering the table testid container even during load with an internal skeleton row, so external tests can find the table element immediately and reduce flakiness.

Initial post-login redirect lands on /admin/organizadores instead of /admin (dashboard). The request allows either; if the dashboard is the intended landing for super-admins, consider redirecting there for consistency with the nav.

RBAC enforcement on /admin/* renders an 'Acceso denegado' screen rather than redirecting to /login or /app/dashboard. Functionally correct, but matches neither of the explicit redirect options listed in the spec — clarify intent or add a redirect.
MRR delta is null by design (no historical snapshot). Consider persisting a daily/monthly KPI snapshot collection so delta % can be computed for MRR as already done for GMV.
seed_data_creation: None (used existing seeded organizers, events, audit log, plans).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 5.5 fully verified. New endpoints: /api/admin/dashboard/stats (new shape), /api/admin/attention-items, /api/admin/organizers-rich, /api/admin/audit-log, /api/admin/events, /api/admin/export/{organizers,events,orders,audit-log,monthly-report}.csv. Legacy stats kept at /api/admin/dashboard/stats-legacy. Frontend testids: nav-admin-{dashboard,organizers,events,plans,funnel,audit,reports}, kpi-{mrr,gmv,fees,active-orgs}, chart-{status,plan}, attention-{card,pending-orgs,stale-orders,past-due}, admin-events-{page,table,search,status,category,csv}, admin-audit-page, audit-{table,action-filter,target-filter,view-detail,detail-dialog,csv}, admin-reports-page, reports-grid, monthly-report-card, report-{year,month,monthly-download}. To run backend regression: cd /app/backend && python -m pytest tests/test_phase5_5.py tests/test_phase5_5_extra.py -v
